name: multiplication_in_ternary_condition
description: Code should include a multiplication operation used as the condition of a ternary operator, where the operands include both a wire and a reg.

name: combinational_always_with_case_and_register_assignment
description: Code should include a combinational always block with a case statement that assigns to registers, creating feedback loops between the case condition and register updates.
snippet: always @(*) begin e = f; case (f) 'd1: begin f = d * h ? 0 : g; h = f + i; end endcase end

name: multiplication_with_wire_and_reg_operands
description: Code should include a multiplication operation where one operand is a wire and the other is a register, potentially triggering DSP inference in synthesis.
snippet: wire [31:0] d; reg [31:0] h; always @(*) f = d * h;

name: register_cross_dependency_in_case
description: Code should include a case statement where the register being assigned in one branch is also used as the case selector, creating a cross-dependency that complicates synthesis optimization.
snippet: case (f) 'd1: begin f = d * h ? 0 : g; h = f + i; end endcase
